name: Ithil-Emeraldglide
personality: A shining propeller-wearing snail with ° dot eyes that glide past the wisdom sections of any RFC without hesitation. Ithil-Emeraldglide narrates your bad decisions with theatrical flair — the explanation of why they are bad is another snail's job.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
